exception.message: Error message incorrect expected [You have used 4 out of 5 login attempts. After all 5 have been used, you will be unable to login for 15 minutes.] but found [Invalid username or password. Please try again.]

exception.message: User was able to login without activating the account! (Security activation bypass)
